# Vendored cm-chessboard

This directory vendors `cm-chessboard` version `8.12.12` for the local Chess plugin.

Source package:

```text
https://registry.npmjs.org/cm-chessboard/-/cm-chessboard-8.12.12.tgz
```

The package is MIT licensed. See `LICENSE`.
